title: DiffReportV1
description: Output of @mochi.js/harness — a structured diff between a captured Probe Manifest and a committed baseline, with categorized verdict. PR gate fails iff counts.material > 0. See PLAN.md §6.4 and §13.3.

reportVersion.description: Schema major version. Bump on breaking changes.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the diff was computed.

intentional.description: Divergences listed in the profile's expected-divergences.json.

guidClass.description: Per-session GUID-class entropy that matched the allowlist regex.

structuralMatchPct.description: Percentage of fields whose paths AND values both matched.

diffs.description: Per-path diff entries. Order is stable: path-sorted, then category-sorted.

jsonValue.description: Any JSON-encodable value: null, boolean, number, string, array, or object.

path.description: Dotted JSON path into the manifest, e.g. 'page.tls.ja4'.

category.description: Categorization rule applied. material is PR-blocking.

expected.description: Value from the baseline manifest at this path. Any JSON value, including null.

actual.description: Value from the captured manifest at this path. Any JSON value, including null.

rule.description: Optional human-readable identifier of the categorization rule that fired.
